---
title: "Yu-You Liou"
pagetitle: "Yu-You Liou 劉昱佑"
subtitle: ""
description: "**MStat, MS, BA, BS** \n\n I am a PhD Fellow at NTU and a lecturer at USC, where I teach undergraduate statistics, data analysis, and applied programming. My research focuses on (1) agricultural, environmental, and ecological economics, and (2) urban, regional, and transportation economics."
about:
    template: trestles
    image: pic.png
    links: []
---

## **Education**

- **PhD Fellow** in Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2022–)
- **MS** in Statistics, National Taiwan University (2020–2021)
- **MS** in Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2019–2021)
- **BA** in Political Science, National Taiwan University (2016–2019)
- **BS** in Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2015–2019)

## **Position**

- **Lecturer**, English Taught Program in International Business, Shih Chien University (2023–)
- **Research & Teaching Assistant**, Department of Agricultural Economics, National Taiwan University (2019–)

## **Awards & Grants**

- NSTC Graduate Research Fellowship, National Science and Technology Council, 2022–2026.
- Teaching Grant, Shih Chien University, 2025.
- Research Grant, CMC Magnetics Co., Ltd. (2323), 2025

## **Acknowledgement**

I am profoundly grateful to Professor [**Hung-Hao Chang**](https://sites.google.com/view/hh-chang) for his academic guidance and personal support throughout my master's and doctoral journey. His mentorship has left a lasting impact for which I will always be thankful.
